name: Special Variables Tests
description: Test cases for bash special variables

tests.name: PPID - Parent Process ID
tests.description: PPID returns virtual parent process ID (1 for sandbox)

tests.name: UID - User ID
tests.description: UID returns virtual user ID (1000 for regular user)

tests.name: EUID - Effective User ID
tests.description: EUID returns virtual effective user ID (same as UID)

tests.name: GROUPS - Supplementary Group IDs
tests.description: GROUPS returns space-separated list of group IDs

tests.name: BASHPID - Current Bash PID
tests.description: BASHPID returns current bash process ID (same as $$ for now)

tests.name: BASH_SUBSHELL - Subshell Nesting Level
tests.description: BASH_SUBSHELL returns subshell nesting level (0 for main shell)

tests.name: OSTYPE - Operating System Type
tests.description: OSTYPE returns the operating system type (darwin, linux-gnu, etc.)

tests.name: MACHTYPE - Machine Type
tests.description: MACHTYPE returns the machine hardware type

tests.name: UID in conditional check
tests.description: UID can be used in conditional expressions

tests.name: GROUPS in loop
tests.script: for g in $GROUPS; do echo "group: $g"; done
tests.description: GROUPS can be iterated as space-separated list
